name: Zhejiang Huada New Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Huada New Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the production, research and development, and sale of crystalline cold rolled steel and corrosion resistance of hot plating zinc plated steel plate products in China. It offers hot galvanized, rolling hard, acid pickling roll, color coating, and peritoneal color plate products. The company exports to Europe, Southeast Asia, and the Middle East. Zhejiang Huada New Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Hangzhou, China. Zhejiang Huada New Materials Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Zhejiang Huada Group Co.,Ltd.
